  • Reference

Title

Source: R/assoc_apply_stat_model.R
assoc_apply_stat_model.Rd

Title

Usage

assoc_apply_stat_model(
  tempDataFrame,
  g_start,
  family_test,
  covariates = NULL,
  key,
  transformation_y,
  dototal,
  session_folder,
  independent_variable,
  depth_analysis = 3,
  samples_sql_condition,
  inference_detail = NULL,
  ...
)

Arguments

tempDataFrame

data frame to apply association

g_start

index of starting data

family_test

family of test to run

covariates

vector of covariates

key

key to identify file to elaborate

transformation_y

transformation_y to apply to covariates, burden and independent variable

dototal

do a total per area

session_folder

where to save log file

independent_variable

independent variable name

depth_analysis

depth's analysis

samples_sql_condition

SQL condition string to filter samples

...

extra parameters

Value

A data.frame with one row per tested genomic area, including columns for p-value, adjusted p-value, test statistic, AIC, residuals, and model metadata; returns NULL if no results could be computed.

On this page
